title: Shadow in the Cloud
subTitle: A WWII pilot is assigned a secret mission to travel with confidential documents on a Boeing B-17 Flying Fortress. However, she soon has to deal with an evil presence on board.

title: The Balkan Line
subTitle: NATO bombs Belgrade in March 1999 and Serbian forces withdraw from Kosovo by June, leaving Serbs vulnerable. Meanwhile, five Russians try to secure Kosovo's airport until peacekeepers arrive.

title: Untraceable
subTitle: When a series of killings are broadcast online, an agent must decode the twisted mind behind a digital trap where public attention directly fuels each gruesome death.

title: Cvf
subTitle: Six police officers investigate a murder in a suburban lodge. Their only clue is a fake address from the park register. They must solve the mystery quickly.

title: Cvf
subTitle: Six police officers investigate a murder in a suburban lodge. Their only clue is a fake address from the park register. They must solve the mystery quickly.

title: Our Kind of Traitor
subTitle: Perry and his wife go on a holiday to save their marriage and come across Dima, a man who is involved with the mafia. They soon find themselves caught in the middle of a crisis.

title: Danger Close
subTitle: Young and amateur Australian and New Zealand soldiers strive hard to survive during the brutal Battle of Long Tan in Vietnam.

title: Vertigo
subTitle: Scottie Ferguson, a former police officer from San Francisco suffering from acrophobia, is hired by an old friend to investigate the peculiar behaviour of his beautiful wife, Madeleine.

title: School of Life
subTitle: A biology teacher tries to win the Teacher of the Year award in order to continue the legacy of his father, who worked at the same school and won the title every year.

title: Return of Wu Kong
subTitle: Demons exploit Sun Wukong's amnesia, seizing power and causing chaos in the mythical realm as the Monkey King's absence creates a dangerous vacuum.

title: You Were Never Really Here
subTitle: An army veteran scours a brothel on a tense mission to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a New York State senator. However, things soon take a dark turn when he discovers a corrupt conspiracy.

title: Greenland
subTitle: A comet's impending impact sends John, Allison and Nathan on a dangerous journey to a secure shelter, battling disasters, uncertainty and human desperation.

title: Alien Invasion
subTitle: Friends discover a mysterious egg containing a dangerous predator, and now they race against time to stop the creature from reaching civilization.

title: Paddington 2
subTitle: Paddington embarks on an epic quest to find a stolen pop-up book that he bought for his beloved Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday.

title: Mona Lisa and the Blood Moon
subTitle: Mona Lisa, a woman with psychokinetic powers, escapes from a mental asylum and travels to New Orleans. Once there, she meets Bonnie who decides to make use of her powers to earn money.

title: Uncaged
subTitle: A sleepwalking teen attaches a camera to himself at night. Later, he finds out a dark secret about his family from the footage.

title: Uncaged
subTitle: A sleepwalking teen attaches a camera to himself at night. Later, he finds out a dark secret about his family from the footage.

title: American Animals
subTitle: Four friends hatch a plan to carry out an audacious heist, stealing books that are worth millions from a college library.

title: Huge Shark
subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Filler
subTitle: Music fills the world with love, bridging gaps between souls and connecting us to the Supreme. Through songs, people unite for a better world, spreading peace, hope, and understanding.

title: Cvf
subTitle: Cvf

title: Jeepers Creepers 2
subTitle: A bus carrying a high school basketball team suffers a flat tyre following the kidnapping of Billy Taggar. Trouble ensues when those on board encounter the Creeper, a demonic winged creature.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: King
subTitle: Raja and his father, who live in Hong Kong, are devastated when an accident leaves the latter on the verge of death. He decides to reunite his father with his grandfather in order to make him happy.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Pressure
subTitle: A group of divers are recruited to repair an oil pipeline at a seabed. However, when the vessel that carries the divers' pod sinks in a storm, the divers get stuck at the bottom of the sea.

title: Vice
subTitle: Dick Cheney embarks on an ambitious journey, evolving from a mere bureaucratic official in Washington to becoming an influential vice president under George W Bush.

title: Perfect Nanny
subTitle: Myriam decides to return to work at a law firm and hires a nanny, Louise, to look after her children. However, a treacherous web of mutual dependence soon forms between Louise, Myriam and her family.

title: Tai Chi Hero
subTitle: Lu Chan is still trying to find his place in his new home, but his presence in Chen Village triggers a curse on the town.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Military-industrial thugs kill a Marine (Daniel Hugh Kelly) to keep him quiet, but his ex-Marine wife (Amy Madigan) fights back.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: Backstabbing for Beginners
subTitle: Michael, a young United Nations employee, is shocked when he discovers a scandalous global conspiracy involving the murder of his predecessor.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: River Monsters

title: Cold Skin
subTitle: A meteorologist travels to a remote island in the South Atlantic to work as a weather observer. However, he finds himself trapped amongst dangerous creatures living on the island.

title: Please Stand By
subTitle: Wendy, a young woman with autism, runs away from her caregiver and embarks on a journey of a lifetime in order to submit her manuscript to a screenwriting competition.

subTitle: Stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

title: Maggie
subTitle: A man takes extreme steps to protect Maggie, his daughter, who is slowly turning into a cannibal after a zombie attack. He spends time with her, reminiscing about her childhood, dreading the future.

subTitle: Dennis Campbell is hired by a criminal authority to deliver a package to a gangster in London. However, he finds out that his brother's killer dwells in the same city and decides to seek revenge.

subTitle: An intelligence officer teams up with three diligent agents to recover a coveted weapon that holds the power to ignite an international conflict.
